query:
SELECT id, externalId, serviceType, provider, planName, avcId, locId, locationAddress, customerExternalId, customerName, monthlyCost, status, email, discoveryNotes
FROM services 
WHERE email LIKE '%rvcict%' 
   OR email LIKE '%kateresident%'
   OR discoveryNotes LIKE '%13207099%'
   OR discoveryNotes LIKE '%13300275%'
   OR discoveryNotes LIKE '%RVC%'
   OR discoveryNotes LIKE '%Kate Donald%'
   OR customerName LIKE '%RVC%'
   OR customerName LIKE '%Ian Donald%'
LIMIT 15;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT id, externalId, serviceType, provider, planName, avcId, locId, locationAddress, customerExternalId, customerName, monthlyCost, status, email, discoveryNotes
FROM services 
WHERE email LIKE '%rvcict%' 
   OR email LIKE '%kateresident%'
   OR discoveryNotes LIKE '%13207099%'
   OR discoveryNotes LIKE '%13300275%'
   OR discoveryNotes LIKE '%RVC%'
   OR discoveryNotes LIKE '%Kate Donald%'
   OR customerName LIKE '%RVC%'
   OR customerName LIKE '%Ian Donald%'
LIMIT 15;
